prompt: Tap seat S2 to lock the acting anchor.
why_v1: Seat anchors keep your action tied to the right player.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Seat S2 is the right seat anchor, so the read stays tied to the exact player slot this track decision is built around.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Seat S2 is the right anchor here because the flop decision has to stay tied to the correct tournament player instead of drifting to another seat.
